plugins.cameraPermission: Allow p2p-chat to access your camera for video calls.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow p2p-chat to access your microphone for voice calls.

infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow p2p-chat to access your microphone for voice calls.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow p2p-chat to access your camera for video calls.
